CREATE TABLE "Demo"."demo"."Categories" ("Description" VARCHAR, "CategoryID" INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY ("CategoryID"));
CREATE TABLE "Demo"."demo"."Products" ("CategoryID" INTEGER, "ProductName" VARCHAR, FOREIGN KEY ("CategoryID") REFERENCES "Demo"."demo"."Categories" ("CategoryID"));
ALTER TABLE "Demo"."demo"."Products" ADD CONSTRAINT "Demo.demo.Products_Demo.demo.Categories_FK" FOREIGN KEY ("CategoryID") REFERENCES "Demo"."demo"."Categories" ("CategoryID");
SELECT * FROM "Demo"."demo"."Categories" WHERE "CategoryID" IN (SELECT "CategoryID" FROM "Demo"."demo"."Products" WHERE "ProductName" LIKE '%widget%');
SELECT DISTINCT "C"."Description", "P"."ProductName" FROM "Demo"."demo"."Categories" AS "C" JOIN "Demo"."demo"."Products" AS "P" ON "C"."CategoryID" = "P"."CategoryID";

SELECT "C"."CategoryID", COUNT("P"."ProductName") AS "ProductCount" FROM "Demo"."demo"."Categories" AS "C" LEFT JOIN "Demo"."demo"."Products" AS "P" ON "C"."CategoryID" = "P"."CategoryID" GROUP BY "C"."CategoryID" HAVING COUNT("P"."ProductName") > 0;
DELETE FROM "Demo"."demo"."Products" WHERE "CategoryID" = (SELECT "CategoryID" FROM "Demo"."demo"."Categories" WHERE "Description" = 'Test Category');
